generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance IoTSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensors deployed in physical building collecting real-time data (temperature, humidity, occupancy, energy consumption) via Eclipse Hono for ingestion and Eclipse Ditto for normalization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData IoTSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental monitors capturing real-time environmental parameters (temperature, humidity) for building optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalMonitorDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensors detecting presence/absence of occupants to enable adaptive control strategies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensors used in BOREALIS project for iterative optimization of lighting systems via reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption monitors tracking real-time energy usage metrics for predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionMonitorDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance IoTSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time IoT data transmitted via Eclipse Hono using standardized APIs for low-latency integration."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IoTSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalMonitorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Environmental data transmitted from monitors to DT via Eclipse Ditto bidirectional communication."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalMonitor
]

instance OccupancySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Occupancy data transmitted in real-time for adaptive control policies."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance PostOccupancySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor data used for reinforcement learning optimization in BOREALIS project."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMonitorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Energy consumption metrics transmitted for predictive analytics and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMonitor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model (BIM) serving as semantic backbone enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations) and control logic."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler, ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from IoT sensors ingested via Eclipse Hono for immediate processing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData IoTSensorDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalMonitorDataTransmitted, OccupancySensorDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionMonitorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance HistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical operational data used for predictive analytics and trend analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData IoTSensorDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionMonitorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance RuntimeArtifacts : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Generated runtime artifacts (middleware configurations, control logic) via model-to-model/text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BimModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoEnabler, UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D visualization model for interactive monitoring in Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BimModel, RealTimeOperationalData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion and real-time communication using standardized APIs."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management, bidirectional synchronization, and lifecycle handling."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ConfigurationManagementService, BidirectionalControlService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for rich, interactive 3D visualization of building infrastructure."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, ScenarioSimulationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools for automated transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService, RuntimeConfigurationService
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics engine for energy optimization and operational efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real-time monitoring of building parameters through sensor data integration."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering immersive 3D visualization of building operations in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:provides InteractiveVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing predictive analytics on historical and real-time data for optimization."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionPredictionInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing energy consumption using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) and control logic (TwinLight)."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance ConfigurationManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing runtime configuration of building control systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyUpdateAction
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating commissioning of Building Control Systems via model-driven transformations."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemCommissioningAction
]

instance ScenarioSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling simulation-based scenarios for design change evaluation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ScenarioEvaluationInsight
]

instance BidirectionalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling bidirectional communication between DT and physical Building Control Systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlSignalAction
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service adapting control policies dynamically based on real-time conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveConfigurationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring dashboard showing current building parameters (temperature, occupancy, energy usage)."
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations with real-time data overlay."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics output showing expected energy consumption patterns."
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on operational efficiency improvements through data-driven analysis."
]

instance ScenarioEvaluationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Evaluation results from simulation-based scenarios testing design changes."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated energy optimization actions derived from reinforcement learning (BOREALIS) or control logic (TwinLight)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlPolicyUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic updates to building control policies based on real-time conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemCommissioningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated commissioning of Building Control Systems using model-driven transformations."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlSignalAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control signals sent from DT to physical Building Control Systems for real-time adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adaptive configuration of control systems based on runtime conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting control actuators enabling adaptive lighting systems as demonstrated in BOREALIS and TwinLight projects."
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control Systems (BCS) receiving control signals from DT for operational adjustments."
]

instance HvacController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC controllers integrated with DT for energy-efficient climate control."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain environment focusing on building infrastructure with cyber-physical integration."
    base:contains BimModel, RealTimeOperationalData, HistoricalData, RuntimeArtifacts, VisualizationModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **runtime interfaces** generated from BIM models, allowing the DT to send control commands back to the physical building’s **Building Control Systems (BCS)**. For example, the **TwinLight** project demonstrates how the DT can adjust lighting parameters in real-time based on occupancy or energy optimization goals. The framework supports **bidirectional communication** via middleware (Hono/Ditto) and ensures that control logic defined in BIM is automatically deployed to physical actuators, enabling **closed-loop operational control**."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time synchronization** time scale, ensuring continuous alignment between the physical building and its virtual counterpart. The framework supports **live data exchange** (e.g., sensor readings, system states) with minimal latency, enabling immediate feedback loops for control and monitoring. While specific time scales (e.g., millisecond-level or second-level updates) are not explicitly defined, the emphasis is on **near-real-time synchronization** to maintain operational relevance. This is critical for applications like adaptive lighting control (BOREALIS) and dynamic energy management."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: Provides the semantic foundation (geometry, topology, component relationships).
  2. **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange and synchronization.
  3. **Control Layer**: Automated deployment of BCS logic via model-driven transformations.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring.
  5. **Extension Layer**: Custom services (e.g., AI, analytics) integrated via standardized APIs. The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across building subsystems and enables **holistic life-cycle management** through coordinated roles (Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, DT Engineers)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the **entire building life cycle**, covering phases from **initial design** through **construction**, **refurbishment/adaptation**, and **operation**. It provides representations of the physical asset as:
  - **As-designed (ideal)**: Leveraging BIM models for design-time simulations and clash detection.
  - **As-operated**: Integrating real-time operational data to reflect the current state of the building.
  The framework supports **continuous evolution** of the DT to adapt to changes in the physical infrastructure, such as renovations or system upgrades, ensuring long-term relevance and compatibility with AECO standards."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are assessed using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the alignment between the virtual and physical representations. The framework includes:
  - **Model validation** to ensure semantic consistency and completeness before deployment.
  - **Real-time synchronization** to maintain operational relevance.
  - **Automated data normalization** to handle heterogeneous data sources.
  While specific mechanisms like **uncertainty management** or **sensor calibration** are not detailed, the ODTE metric provides a quantitative measure of the DT’s accuracy and reliability in reflecting the physical system’s state."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and digital twin (DT) is established using **Eclipse Hono** and **Eclipse Ditto** for **real-time data exchange**. These platforms support:
  - **Bidirectional communication** between sensors/actuators and the DT.
  - **Metadata-driven integration** to map BIM models to physical devices.
  - **Standardized protocols** (e.g., MQTT, HTTP) for data transmission, though specific protocols are not explicitly listed in the document.
  The connection ensures **low-latency synchronization** and **scalable deployment** across distributed building infrastructures."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, primarily **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, to ensure interoperability and compatibility with existing industry practices. While specific standards like **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** or **OPC UA** are not explicitly mentioned, the framework is designed to integrate with **BIM-based workflows** and **domain-specific control semantics** (e.g., lighting systems in TwinLight). The use of **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** aligns with open-source, standardized middleware solutions for real-time data exchange."
]
